label: wealth (profuse abundance)
pattern: InstanceSchema; MUCH-MANY of a good kind + not-few
gloss: A great abundance of some valued thing, such that there is far more of it present than is usual or than could be needed.
notes: AST adequacy: faithful — there are very many good things of the kind; there are not few — an adequate reading of 'profuse abundance'.

provenance.source: WordNet-3.1 synset gloss (candidate-pool.json, benchmark-blind item screen)
provenance.source_gloss: the quality of profuse abundance; "she has a wealth of talent"
provenance.bar_note: this is the ABUNDANCE sense of the eligible synset (n-05123428), NOT the riches/money sense a reviewer may expect; the gloss must make the sense unmistakable or the WN alignment check will read as the wrong sense.
